name: BPE
oneliner: Dominant subword tokenization. Iteratively merge most frequent adjacent pairs. Byte-level BPE (GPT-2+) handles any text with no unknown tokens.
explanation: Start with byte/char vocabulary, count adjacent pairs, merge most frequent, repeat. Used by GPT-2/3/4, Llama, Mistral, Falcon.

foundational_papers.title: Neural Machine Translation of Rare Words with Subword Units
